typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	FileName as string (),
	FoundFile as string (),
	sFileDate as string (),
	sNewFileName as string ()
}

source(output(
		Date as string,
		Foundation_Name as string,
		Org as string,
		Space as string,
		App_Name as string,
		Current_Droplet_Buildpack_Name as string,
		Stack as string,
		App_Last_Updated as string,
		BuildPack_Deprecation_Date as string,
		Buildpack_Status as string,
		App_ID as string,
		Application_Name as string,
		RemedyId as string,
		App_Lifecycle_Status as string,
		Leadership_Level_1 as string,
		Leadership_Level_2 as string,
		Leadership_Level_3 as string,
		Application_Portfolio_Owner as string,
		Primary_Technical_Manager as string,
		Alternate_Technical_Manager as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false) ~> FilefromPCFDropzone
FilefromPCFDropzone derive(Import_date = currentDate()) ~> AddImportDate
AddImportDate sink(input(
		Space as string,
		App_Lifecycle_Status as string,
		Leadership_Level_3 as string,
		Leadership_Level_1 as string,
		Leadership_Level_2 as string,
		Application_Name as string,
		Org as string,
		Foundation_Name as string,
		BuildPack_Deprecation_Date as string,
		App_Name as string,
		Date as string,
		Stack as string,
		RemedyId as string,
		App_ID as string,
		Primary_Technical_Manager as string,
		App_Last_Updated as string,
		Alternate_Technical_Manager as string,
		Buildpack_Status as string,
		Application_Portfolio_Owner as string,
		Import_date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		Current_Droplet_Buildpack_Name as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		Space,
		App_Lifecycle_Status,
		Leadership_Level_3,
		Leadership_Level_1,
		Leadership_Level_2,
		Application_Name,
		Org,
		Foundation_Name,
		BuildPack_Deprecation_Date,
		App_Name,
		Date,
		Stack,
		RemedyId,
		App_ID,
		Primary_Technical_Manager,
		App_Last_Updated,
		Alternate_Technical_Manager,
		Buildpack_Status,
		Application_Portfolio_Owner,
		Import_date,
		Current_Droplet_Buildpack_Name)) ~> SharepointTASBuildpacks
